title: Hubbly - [1.20.6 - 26.x
description: All in one hub / lobby plugin
body:
# Hubbly
Hubbly is a highly customizable, lightweight hub plugin that aims to one day be an all in one replacement for any server.

# [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/tM5JVsGWnY) | [Wiki](https://calceo.gitbook.io/hubbly)

# Hub Essentials
- Compass server selector
- Launchpads
- Actions System (SEE WIKI!)
- Shop item (runs a command like /buy)
- BossBar (w/ animations!)
- Auto Announcements!
- Socials item
- Player visibility
- Anti void fall
- Spawn and Setspawn
- Custom items
- Disable worlds
- Anti World Download
- Movement items! (Enderbow, grappling hook, etc.)

# Custom Join Events
- Items on join
- Custom Join/Leave messages
- Title on join
- Firework on join
- Spawn on join
- Actions system!

# World Event Management
- Block place
- Block break
- Damage
- Weather
- Item drop
- Item pickup
- Hunger
- Mob spawning
- Block burn
- Death messages
- Leaf decay
- Projectiles

# Misc
- Placeholder API support
- Hex Color supports (Join leave messages, BossBar, Titles)
- Blocked commands (/pl /help /version)
- Blocked words
- Lock Chat

## Please leave suggestions in the reviews tab, or in the discord :)
Reviews are not for posting bugs, stacktracers, or errors. Please kindly post these in the discord server so I can assist :)

## Heads
This plugin uses [minecraft-heads](https://minecraft-heads.com/) for its heads, any skin can be used aslong as there is a "value" field. These can be used for the socials item, both for the item material and the items inside of the GUI. Support of this for the server selector is planned.
